items.name: weekly-food-plan
items.description: HelloFresh for agents: this skill allows your agent (openclaw, claude etc) to do your weekly shopping for you. It generates a list of meals, letting you pick what you want, then does the shopping for you in your favorite online grocery store and uploads the receipe so you can get it on your phone when it's time to cook.

items.name: text2sql
items.description: # Harness Engineer - SQL Query Assistant  🚀 基于 DeepAgent 框架的智能 SQL 查询助手，专为 Harness Engineer 打造。  **核心能力：** - 💬 自然语言 → SQL 自动转换 - 🔍 智能 Schema 探索 - 📊 LangSmith 完整追踪 -  阿里云 Qwen-Max 驱动 - 🔒 只读安全模式  **技术栈：** DeepAgents | LangChain | LangGraph | Qwen-Max | SQLite

items.name: ESP32-CAM-WatchTower
items.description: A fun full-featured WiFi surveillance system for the AI Thinker ESP32-CAM (HW-381 board, OV2640 sensor). Streams live video, captures photos, records AVI video, detects motion, and sends alerts via Telegram, all controlled from a built-in web dashboard or Telegram bot commands

items.name: Nombo_Rides
items.description: Nombo Rides – MVP Nombo Rides is a modern ride-hailing platform built to solve everyday transportation challenges in Cameroon and beyond. Whether you're commuting to work, heading to campus, going to the market, or traveling across town, Nombo Rides connects riders with reliable drivers quickly, safely, and affordably.
